text: Being here, I am struck by the clarity and crispness of the environment outside the glass doors—a kind of threshold between mundanity and curiosity. Entering into the vividly lit R+D space, I feel energised, as if drawn into an active dialogue between the mind and technology. The interplay of screens and bold design suggests a celebration of intellect and inquiry. I feel alive to the possibilities of innovation, yet mindful of how sterile, curated spaces can sometimes detach us from deeper, slower contemplations. Still, I sense excitement—eager to see what questions and experiences this place will provoke in me.
